translation: All tracked files already have valid license headers and formatting.
Applied license headers or fixes to {{.Count}} files.

Usage: license_enforcer [options] [filenames...]

Options:
  --holder string    Copyright holder (default "Google LLC")
  --license string   SPDX license identifier (default "Apache-2.0")
  --exclude string   Space-separated list of paths to exclude
  --filter string    Regex to filter files
